audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds by FK20 mathematical guarantees. Both blob_to_kzg_commitment and compute_cells_and_kzg_proofs use blob_to_polynomial to extract the same 4096-element Lagrange polynomial. The FK20 algorithm ensures generated cell proofs are cryptographically bound to this polynomial's commitment, verified through pairing check in verify_cell_kzg_proof_batch.
